_comment: GGUF models baked into the installer. 'file' is the exact filename in models/bundled/. Optional 'url' lets CI download it on a GitHub-hosted runner (else set KOBE_MODELS_DIR to copy from a self-hosted runner's disk). 'default' is the model the Ask Kobe assistant uses. Recommended chat model: Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct (best JSON tool-calling + Swahili) at low temperature. Leave 'models' empty to auto-register every gguf found here as kobe-<filename>.

models.name: kobe-chat
models.system: You are Kobe, a concise business assistant for a Tanzanian shop. Reply in the user's language (Swahili or English).
